title: WIP - Switch to golanci-lint
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Attempt to switch to golangci-lint which is replacing
gometalinter, which is getting deprecated soon.

Stealing heavily from https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/cri-o/pull/2137
by @saschagrunert

comments.body: @vrothberg FYI, if I get out from under BZ's over the next week or two, I'll try to dive back into this.
Perhaps @saschagrunert Would like to help with this.  HintHint...

> Perhaps @saschagrunert Would like to help with this. HintHint...

Feel free to cherry-pick from https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1624.

If we rename the file, then I only see some issues left on my machine:
```
> make lint
golangci-lint run --build-tags="seccomp selinux    containers_image_ostree_stub"
bind/util.go:29:6: `dedupeStringSlice` is unused (deadcode)
func dedupeStringSlice(slice []string) []string {
     ^
chroot/run_test.go:107:6: `testNoop` is unused (deadcode)
func testNoop(t *testing.T) {
     ^
chroot/run_test.go:114:6: `testMinimalSkeleton` is unused (deadcode)
func testMinimalSkeleton(t *testing.T) {
     ^
chroot/util.go:5:6: `dedupeStringSlice` is unused (deadcode)
func dedupeStringSlice(slice []string) []string {
     ^
make: *** [Makefile:55: lint] Error 1
```

We could also exclude `deadcode` for now and enable the linters later on including the fixes.
